category_sources: Official wxWidgets homepage presents wxWidgets as a cross-platform GUI library.
source_facts.description says wxWidgets is a cross-platform C++ GUI toolkit.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub repository use wxWidgets capitalization.
docs_sources: Official code repository page documents official GitHub source access.
Official homepage Quick Links point to the online manual at docs.wxwidgets.org.
Official wxWidgets Reference Manuals page lists current and older manuals.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/wxWidgets/wxWidgets, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official wxWidgets repository description is Cross-Platform C++ GUI Library.
source_facts.description identifies a cross-platform C++ GUI toolkit.
source_facts.executables includes wx-config and wxrc development tools.
